response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified the video as a Hololive concert performance. 
2. Recognized the song as 'Our Bright Parade' based on the lyrics and context. 
3. Performed a web search for 'hololive Our Bright Parade lyrics' to verify the title and get the full lyrics.
4. Mapped the entire video to a single scene containing the vocal music, as it's a continuous performance of the same song.
5. Structured the JSON with the song metadata and the retrieved lyrics.
response.global_summary: A performance video featuring various Hololive VTubers singing the song 'Our Bright Parade' at a concert.

scenes.description: Various Hololive VTubers perform the song 'Our Bright Parade' in a concert setting, with fans waving lightsticks.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Parade, parade, parade!
It's shining, with the voices calling each other as a signal
Parade, parade, parade!
The start of searching, no matter how many times
I just spelled out my monologues
I just ran because I wanted to start
It lit up in the far darkness
That name was too dazzling
That memory was too gentle
I reached out my hand, wanting to get closer
Unexpectedly, we were connected
Look, now the lost child has become "Us"
Parade, parade, parade!
It's shining!
Bring along the frustration and the love
The wind, the dream, the wings
We can take flight
The small prayer is light
Endless signs
That I found you
I can hold my chest high
From here, from now on
Our bright parade, parade!
Singing of the still unreliable premonition
There's nothing to be ashamed of
The imaginary that no one can solve
A spell that we might meet again someday
The story that started from zero that day
Words that can't be counted
It's not a feeling like counting them
Look, let's call "Us" as one now
Parade, parade, parade!
It's beautiful!
The moment we can forgive each other
The night glitters
Rain, clear, kaleidoscope
The irreplaceable sky
The appropriate journey
Is to be with you
It is to be with you
If I hear "Welcome back"
I will shout "Welcome home"
Isn't it natural?
Parade, parade, parade!
It's shining!
What fills the darkness
Is you and me!
Parade, parade, parade!
It's shining!
Bring along the frustration and the love
The wind, the dream, the wings
We can take flight
The small prayer is light
Endless signs
Plunging into you
A wonderful start
From here, from now on
Our bright parade, parade!
Our bright parade, parade!
